banner.title: CBSE EXAMS POSTPONED (MARCH 2)
banner.subtitle: Official Notice Inside — 7 Gulf Countries Affected

cbse.summary: CBSE has officially postponed Class 10 and Class 12 board exams scheduled for March 2, 2026 in 7 Middle East countries. New dates to be announced after review on March 3.
cbse.issuedBy: Controller of Examinations, Dr. Sanyam Bhardwaj

meaCentral.description: Ministry of External Affairs — Open 24/7 for overseas emergencies

madad.description: Register grievances for Indian nationals abroad

airlines.name: Air India
airlines.crisisNote: All flights to/from Gulf suspended until further notice. Full refund available.

airlines.name: IndiGo
airlines.crisisNote: Gulf routes suspended. Waiver applicable — rebook or refund at no charge.

airlines.name: Emirates
airlines.crisisNote: All Emirates flights suspended. Travel waiver in place for affected routes.

airlines.name: Etihad Airways
airlines.crisisNote: Abu Dhabi flights suspended. Flexible rebooking and refund options available.

airlines.name: SpiceJet
airlines.crisisNote: Gulf operations suspended. Full refund or credit shell available.

airlines.name: Air India Express
airlines.crisisNote: All Gulf Express flights cancelled. Passengers eligible for full refund.

airlines.name: flydubai
airlines.crisisNote: All operations suspended from Dubai. Refund and rebooking available.

airlines.name: Qatar Airways
airlines.crisisNote: Doha hub closed. Full flexibility — refund or rebook without fee.

airlines.name: Akasa Air
airlines.crisisNote: International Gulf routes suspended. Refund processing in 7 days.

airlines.name: Gulf Air
airlines.crisisNote: Bahrain-based flights cancelled. Rebooking available for up to 12 months.

airlines.name: Oman Air
airlines.crisisNote: Muscat flights disrupted. Limited waiver available — contact support.

airlines.name: Air Arabia
airlines.crisisNote: Sharjah flights suspended. Full refund or open-date rebooking.

airlines.name: Saudia
airlines.crisisNote: All Saudi Arabia routes suspended. Waiver policy active for March bookings.

advisories.title: Iran Launches Missile Strikes — Gulf Airspace Closed
advisories.summary: Iran has launched ballistic missile strikes targeting multiple Gulf states. All civilian airspace over UAE, Qatar, Bahrain, Kuwait and parts of Saudi Arabia has been closed with immediate effect. Military action is ongoing.

advisories.title: CBSE Postpones Gulf Board Exams — Official Circular Issued
advisories.summary: CBSE Controller of Examinations has issued an official circular postponing Class 10 and Class 12 board examinations in 7 Gulf countries. Students are advised to await further instructions. New dates will be announced post March 3 review.

advisories.title: MEA Activates 24/7 Emergency Operations
advisories.summary: Ministry of External Affairs has activated round-the-clock emergency helplines for Indians in Gulf countries. All embassies and consulates have been placed on high alert.

advisories.title: Air India, IndiGo Suspend All Gulf Routes
advisories.summary: Air India and IndiGo have suspended all flights to and from Gulf countries with immediate effect. Both airlines are offering full refunds or free rebooking for affected passengers.

advisories.title: UAE Issues Shelter-in-Place Order for Residents
advisories.summary: UAE government has issued a shelter-in-place directive for all residents. Citizens and expatriates are advised to stay indoors, stock essential supplies, and avoid non-essential travel.

advisories.title: Qatar Airspace Closed — Doha Airport Operations Halted
advisories.summary: Qatar Civil Aviation Authority has closed national airspace and halted all operations at Hamad International Airport. Qatar Airways has suspended all departures and arrivals until further notice.

advisories.title: Saudi Arabia Intercepts Missiles — Partial Airspace Closure
advisories.summary: Saudi Arabia's air defense systems have intercepted several ballistic missiles. Riyadh and Jeddah airports are temporarily closed. Saudi authorities urge calm while military operations continue.

advisories.title: Indian Navy on Standby — Evacuation Vessels Positioned
advisories.summary: Indian Navy has positioned evacuation vessels in the Arabian Sea as a precautionary measure. Operation Sindhu II protocols are on standby pending government authorization.

advisories.title: Kuwait Declares State of Emergency
advisories.summary: Kuwait has declared a state of emergency and closed Kuwait International Airport. All non-essential government operations are suspended. Indian Embassy in Kuwait is operational with 24/7 helplines.

advisories.title: Bahrain Airspace Restricted — Gulf Air Flights Cancelled
advisories.summary: Bahrain has restricted its airspace for civilian traffic. Gulf Air has cancelled all scheduled flights until further notice. Indian Embassy in Manama is operational.

disclaimer: This resource hub aggregates publicly available information for Indians affected by the Gulf crisis. For verified, real-time updates, always consult official embassy websites and government sources. Emergency contact numbers are sourced from official government portals. This site is not affiliated with any government body.
